about.bio1: Programming instructor with over 2 years of teaching experience in Persian; specializing in the React, Next.js, and Node.js ecosystem. My goal is to turn complex concepts into simple, practical lessons.
about.bio2: My courses are designed from beginner to advanced so every student can quickly enter the job market. Online support and practical projects are part of every course.

skills.label: Skills
skills.sub: The tools and technologies I teach

projects.bundleNote: 🎁 With any purchase, you get full <1>lifetime access to all 6 courses</1>.

c1.title: Comprehensive React.js Course
c1.desc: From Hooks and Context API to React Query and building real-world projects with industry standards.

c2.title: Next.js 14 Mastery
c2.desc: App Router, Server Components, SSR/SSG, and SEO optimization in Next.js 14 with TypeScript.

c3.title: Advanced JavaScript
c3.desc: Master ES6+, Async/Await, Closures, Event Loop, and design patterns.

c4.title: Node.js & Express
c4.desc: Build RESTful APIs, JWT authentication, work with MongoDB, and deploy on real servers.

c5.title: TypeScript from Scratch
c5.desc: Complete TypeScript: data types, Generics, Decorators, and integration with React and Node.

c6.title: Tailwind CSS & UI Design
c6.desc: Design modern responsive UIs with Tailwind, animations, and custom components.

books.sub: International programming books · Nationwide postal delivery · Authenticity guaranteed

B001.subtitle: Learn Python with Real-World Projects
B001.desc: The best book for learning Python from scratch. Includes practical projects: games, data analysis, and web apps.

B002.subtitle: A Modern Guide to JavaScript
B002.desc: Complete introduction to modern JavaScript. Advanced concepts including Closure, Async/Await, and DOM manipulation.

B003.subtitle: Modern React Development Patterns
B003.desc: Build modern apps with React. Includes advanced Hooks, Context API, and Server Components.

B004.subtitle: Principles of Professional Coding
B004.desc: Principles of writing clean, readable code. SOLID principles, Refactoring, Design Patterns, and best practices.

testimonials.label: Student Reviews
testimonials.title: What Our Students Say
testimonials.sub: Over 800 students have already used this academy's courses

items.name: Ali Mohammadi
items.text: Instructor Karimipour explains complex concepts very simply with practical examples. It was the best investment for learning programming. The practical projects really helped me a lot.

items.name: Sara Ahmadi
items.text: I started from zero and after finishing the course I was able to find my first job. Really grateful to the instructor who patiently explained everything.

items.name: Reza Karimi
items.text: The course content is very comprehensive and up-to-date. The quick and accurate support is a great advantage. The support channel is always active.

items.name: Niloofar Rezaei
items.text: Educational courses in simple language with real examples. The practical projects really helped with better understanding. I'll definitely buy the next courses too.

items.name: Amirhossein Tehrani
items.text: By buying the complete package I was able to learn all the skills I need. It's absolutely worth it. Lifetime access is amazing.

items.name: Maryam Sadeghi
items.text: The course content is excellent and the instructor is very knowledgeable. Lifetime access and free course updates are very valuable.
